build.buildCommand: chmod +x create-env.sh && ./create-env.sh && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader --no-scripts && php artisan config:clear && php artisan cache:clear

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan storage:link && php artisan migrate:fresh --seed && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
